tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting suboptimal long-term glycemic control. Potassium is slightly elevated, and total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may indicate a tendency toward mild metabolic acidosis. Renal function and other electrolytes are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and monitoring of glucose and acid-base status.

text.div: Provider Organization: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

name.value: Detská fakultná nemocnica s poliklinikou Banská Bystrica

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
